title: She saved $24,000 to launch a craft festival in an old Joann store: 'This is my dream come true'
summary_full: "This is my dream come true," says Tetef, a long-time events producer. "I just want to go to a thing where everyone's sitting down making stuff."
summary_public: "This is my dream come true," says Tetef, a long-time events producer. "I just want to go to a thing where everyone's sitting down making stuff."
